|desc=In ''[[BW037|A Fishing Connoisseur in a Fishy Competition!]]'', Cilan, during a fake fishing competition hosted by {{TRT}}, hooked a {{p|Basculin|Blue-Striped Basculin}} and battled it with his {{TP|Cilan|Pansage}}. Basculin fought well, but it was quickly defeated by Pansage's {{m|Solar Beam}}. Cilan promptly caught it in a Fishing Poké Ball and handed it to [[Jessie|one of the contest officials]] for judging. Later on, Team Rocket took all of the competitors' caught Pokémon, and attempted to escape with them. However, a female {{p|Frillish}} managed to release all the caught Pokémon, including Basculin.

Basculin's known moves are {{m|Water Gun}}, {{m|Bite}}, and {{m|Aqua Tail}}.}}
